testcase.name: registrationSuccessful
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"link text","selector":"Sign up"} (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.102) For normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:58045/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.7727.102, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, testcase.name: loginSuccessful
